title: Simple Trash Can
description: A small mod that adds a trash can, which lets you get rid of unwanted items.
body:
This mod adds one block: the Trash Can. This block allows you to get rid of unwanted items. To use it, simply right-click, place any item in the slots, and click Empty. You can also use it for extra storage if you need to.

![A Trash Can with a hopper, stone frame, and a cactus with glass windows.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/570a093767061ef75c28740c9edcbc81df41bd08.png)

Crafting Recipe:

![Two cobblestone placed on top of each other on both sides, with a hopper above a cactus between the cobblestone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e444dec0845d5d183205e85fdde9a9c500fb71a1.png)
